title: University of Texas at Austin receives $750 million donation from Michael and Susan Dell
description: Billionaires Michael and Susan Dell are donating $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin. The gift promises to improve patient care through artificial intelligence and increase health care options for the booming state capital.

title: Anthropic commits $100 billion to Amazon's AWS

title: Exclusive-Meta to start capturing employee mouse movements, keystrokes for AI training data
description: NEW YORK, April 21 (Reuters) - Meta is installing new tracking ⁠software on U.S.-based employees' computers to capture mouse movements, clicks ‌and keystrokes for use in training its artificial-intelligence models, part of a broad initiative to build AI agents that can perform work tasks autonomously, the company told ​staffers in internal memos seen by Reuters.
